{{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|qq=}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|qq=}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|qq=}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|qq=}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|qq=}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|qq=}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * [[:en:Kurume|Kurume]] – the city's name is speculated to However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|qq=}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|qq=}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|qq=}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no revision.text:
{{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|qq=}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|qq=}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|qq=}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|qq=}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|qq=}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|qq=}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * [[:en:Kurume|Kurume]] – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated page|ja|来目皇子|version=98815714|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:6th-century military personnel]] [[Category:7th-century military personnel]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:603 deaths]] }} [[ko:구메노 황자]] [[sn:Prince Kume]] [[ja:来目皇子]] [[sn:rince Kume]] [[Category:6th Century Asian Military Personnel]] [[Category:Japanese Royalty in the 6th Century]] [[Category:7th Century Asian Military Personnel]] [[Category:7世紀日本の皇族]] [[Category:戦病死した人物]] [[Category:Children of Emperor Yōmei]] [[Category:Princes of Japan in the Asuka period]]

{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|qq=}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|qq=}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|qq=}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|qq=}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|death_date={{death date|0603|3|25}}|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Q106102067|qid=Q106102067}}; {{ill|Sakurai no Yumihari|qid=Q92923028}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|qid=Q349281}}|mother={{ill|Anahobe no Hashihito no Himemiko|qid=Q11597250}}|relatives={{ill|Prince Ekuri|qid=Q11547041}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|qid=Q11617932}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|qid=Q11577211}}; {{ill|Satomi no Himemiko|qid=Q11383115}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|qid=Q11644412}}; {{ill|Taima no miko|qid=Q11487858}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11523737]] Wikidata name: Kume [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|qq=|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|qq=|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|qq=|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|qq=|1=Jōgūki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|qq=|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|qq=|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|qq=|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * [[:en:Kurume|Kurume]] – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated page|ja|来目皇子|version=98815714|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:6th-century military personnel]] [[Category:7th-century military personnel]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:603 deaths]] }} [[ko:구메노 황자]] {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|qq=|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|qq=|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|qq=|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|qq=|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|qq=|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|qq=|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|qq=|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|qq=|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|qq=|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|qq=|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|qq=|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|qq=|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume revision.text:
[[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|death_date={{death date|0603|3|25}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Q106102067|WD=Q106102067}}; {{ill|Sakurai no Yumihari|WD=Q92923028}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|WD=Q349281}}|mother={{ill|Anahobe no Hashihito no Himemiko|WD=Q11597250}}|relatives={{ill|Prince Ekuri|WD=Q11547041}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|WD=Q11617932}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|WD=Q11577211}}; {{ill|Satomi no Himemiko|WD=Q11383115}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|WD=Q11644412}}; {{ill|Taima no miko|WD=Q11487858}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11523737]] Wikidata name: Kume [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|death_date={{death date|0603|3|25}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Q106102067|WD=Q106102067}}; {{ill|Sakurai no Yumihari|WD=Q92923028}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|WD=Q349281}}|mother={{ill|Anahobe no Hashihito no Himemiko|WD=Q11597250}}|relatives={{ill|Prince Ekuri|WD=Q11547041}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|WD=Q11617932}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|WD=Q11577211}}; {{ill|Satomi no Himemiko|WD=Q11383115}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|WD=Q11644412}}; {{ill|Taima no miko|WD=Q11487858}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11523737]] Wikidata name: Kume [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * [[:en:Kurume|Kurume]] – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated page|ja|来目皇子|version=98815714|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:6th-century military personnel]] [[Category:7th-century military personnel]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:603 deaths]] }} [[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]] [[Category:6th Century Asian Military Personnel]] [[Category:Japanese Royalty in the 6th Century]] [[Category:7th Century Asian Military Personnel]] [[Category:Japanese Royalty in the 7th Century]] [[Category:People who died in war]] [[Category:Children of Emperor Yōmei]] [[Category:Princes of Japan in the Asuka period]] {{wikidata link|Q11523737}}

He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}

([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * [[:en:Kurume|Kurume]] – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated page|ja|来目皇子|version=98815714|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:6th-century military personnel]] [[Category:7th-century military personnel]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:603 deaths]] }} [[ko:구메노 Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|death_date={{death date|0603|3|25}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Q106102067|WD=Q106102067}}; {{ill|Sakurai no Yumihari|WD=Q92923028}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|WD=Q349281}}|mother={{ill|Anahobe no Hashihito no Himemiko|WD=Q11597250}}|relatives={{ill|Prince Ekuri|WD=Q11547041}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|WD=Q11617932}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|WD=Q11577211}}; {{ill|Satomi no Himemiko|WD=Q11383115}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|WD=Q11644412}}; {{ill|Taima no miko|WD=Q11487858}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11523737]] Wikidata name: Kume [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] | mother = [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]] | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]] }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]], also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to [[:en:Tsukushi Province|Chikuzen Province]] and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * [[:en:Kurume|Kurume]] – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated page|ja|来目皇子|version=98815714|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]] {{wikidata link|Q11523737}} [[Category:603 deaths]] [[Category:6th Century Asian Military Personnel]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:6th-century military personnel]] [[Category:7th Century Asian Military Personnel]] [[Category:7th-century military personnel]] [[Category:Children of Emperor Yōmei]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Japanese Royalty in the 6th Century]] [[Category:Japanese Royalty in the 7th Century]] [[Category:People who died in war]] [[Category:Princes of Japan in the Asuka period]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

His temporary burial was conducted in [[:en:Saba District, Yamaguchi|Saba]], present-day [[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]], and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day [[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]]. The site is currently managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]]. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]] * Mother: [[:en:Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|Anahobe no Hashihito]], a daughter of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]] * Siblings: [[:en:Prince Shōtoku|Prince Shōtoku]], {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no He was a son of [[:en:Emperor Yōmei|Emperor Yōmei]]. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
([[:en:Habikino|Habikino, Osaka]])}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
([[:en:Hōfu|Hōfu, Yamaguchi]])}}]] In February 602, during the reign of [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]], Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against [[:en:Silla|Silla]] after its conquest of [[:en:Mimana|Mimana]]. {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the
