revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
[[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|death_date={{death date|0603|3|25}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Q106102067|WD=Q106102067}}; {{ill|Sakurai no Yumihari|WD=Q92923028}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|WD=Q349281}}|mother={{ill|Anahobe no Hashihito no Himemiko|WD=Q11597250}}|relatives={{ill|Prince Ekuri|WD=Q11547041}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|WD=Q11617932}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|WD=Q11577211}}; {{ill|Satomi no Himemiko|WD=Q11383115}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|WD=Q11644412}}; {{ill|Taima no miko|WD=Q11487858}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11523737]] Wikidata name: Kume [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} | mother = {{ill|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|en|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|WD=Q11597250|lt=Anahobe no Hashihito}} | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka}} }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}}, also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}}. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
({{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka}})}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
({{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|WD=Q502209|lt=Hōfu, Yamaguchi}})}}]] In February 602, during the reign of {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|WD=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko}}, Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla}} after its conquest of {{ill|Mimana|en|Mimana|WD=Q1790223|lt=Mimana}}. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to {{ill|Tsukushi Province|en|Tsukushi Province|WD=Q1206461|lt=Chikuzen Province}} and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in {{ill|Saba District, Yamaguchi|en|Saba District, Yamaguchi|WD=Q7395781|lt=Saba}}, present-day {{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|WD=Q502209|lt=Hōfu, Yamaguchi}}, and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka}}. The site is currently managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency}}. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} * Mother: {{ill|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|en|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|WD=Q11597250|lt=Anahobe no Hashihito}}, a daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei}} * Siblings: {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku}}, {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * {{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|WD=Q320934|lt=Kurume}} – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated page|ja|来目皇子|version=98815714|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]] {{wikidata link|Q11523737}} [[Category:603 deaths]] He was a son of {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}}. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
({{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka}})}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
({{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|WD=Q502209|lt=Hōfu, Yamaguchi}})}}]] In February 602, during the reign of {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|WD=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko}}, Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla}} after its conquest of {{ill|Mimana|en|Mimana|WD=Q1790223|lt=Mimana}}. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to {{ill|Tsukushi Province|en|Tsukushi Province|WD=Q1206461|lt=Chikuzen Province}} and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in {{ill|Saba District, Yamaguchi|en|Saba District, Yamaguchi|WD=Q7395781|lt=Saba}}, present-day {{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|WD=Q502209|lt=Hōfu, Yamaguchi}}, and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Hani no Inote|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka}}. The site is currently managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency}}. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=jouguuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} * Mother: {{ill|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|en|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|WD=Q11597250|lt=Anahobe no Hashihito}}, a daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei}} * Siblings: {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku}}, {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist|2}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kume Temple|ja|久米寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kume Temple|1=Kume-dera|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369593}} – believed to have been founded by Prince Kume. * {{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|WD=Q320934|lt=Kurume}} – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated page|ja|来目皇子|version=98815714|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]] {{wikidata link|Q11523737}} [[Category:603 deaths]] The site is currently managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency}}. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his He was a son of {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}}. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
({{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka|1=Habikino}})}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
({{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|WD=Q502209|lt=Hōfu, Yamaguchi|1=Hōfu}})}}]] In February 602, during the reign of {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|WD=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}}, Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}} after its conquest of {{ill|Mimana|en|Mimana|WD=Q1790223|lt=Mimana|1=Mimana}}. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to {{ill|Tsukushi Province|en|Tsukushi Province|WD=Q1206461|lt=Chikuzen Province|1=Tsukushi Province}} and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. The site is currently managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}}. == Genealogy == The genealogy [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] [[ja:来目皇子]][[ko:구메노 황자]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0550|death_date={{death date|0603|3|25}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|spouse={{ill|Q106102067|WD=Q106102067|1=Hirikorō}}; {{ill|Sakurai no Yumihari|WD=Q92923028|1=Sakurai no Yumihari}}|father={{ill|Yōmei|WD=Q349281|1=Emperor Yōmei}}|mother={{ill|Anahobe no Hashihito no Himemiko|WD=Q11597250|1=Princess Hashihito no Anahobe}}|relatives={{ill|Prince Ekuri|WD=Q11547041|1=Prince Ekuri}}; {{ill|Prince Manda|WD=Q11617932|1=Prince Manda}}; {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972|1=Prince Shōtoku}}; {{ill|Prince Tame|WD=Q11577211|1=Prince Tame}}; {{ill|Satomi no Himemiko|WD=Q11383115|1=Satomi no Himemiko}}; {{ill|Sukatehime no Himemiko|WD=Q11644412|1=Princess Sukatehime}}; {{ill|Taima no miko|WD=Q11487858|1=Prince Maroko}}}} {{Infobox royalty | name = Prince Kume (来目皇子) | native_name = | title = | image = | image_size = | caption = | succession = {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} | spouse = {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | issue = {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | royal_house = | father = {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}} | mother = {{ill|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|en|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|WD=Q11597250|lt=Anahobe no Hashihito|1=Princess Hashihito no Anahobe}} | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = {{Death date|603|3|25}} | death_place = {{ill|Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun, Chikuzen Province|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}} | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山岡上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, present-day {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka|1=Habikino}} }} '''Prince Kume''' ({{lang-ja|来目皇子}}, birthdate unknown – March 25, 603) was a Japanese {{ill|Imperial Prince|lt=Imperial Prince|lt=Prince|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince|qq=}} of the {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period|1=Asuka period}}, also referred to as '''Kume no Ō''' (久米王). He was a son of {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}}. == Biography == [[File:Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino), haisho.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's burial site: {{ill|Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|lt=Tsukaana Kofun|ja|塚穴古墳 (羽曳野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukaana Kofun (Habikino)|qq=}}
({{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka|1=Habikino}})}}]] [[File:Temporary burial place of Prince Kume.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Prince Kume's temporary burial site:
{{ill|Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|ja|桑山塔ノ尾古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuwasan Tōno-o Kofun|qq=}}
({{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|WD=Q502209|lt=Hōfu, Yamaguchi|1=Hōfu}})}}]] In February 602, during the reign of {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|WD=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}}, Prince Kume was appointed {{ill|Seishin Dai Shogun|ja|征新羅大将軍|lt=Seishin Dai Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishin Dai Shogun|qq=}} to lead a planned campaign against {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|WD=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}} after its conquest of {{ill|Mimana|en|Mimana|WD=Q1790223|lt=Mimana|1=Mimana}}. Commanding an army of 25,000, he advanced to {{ill|Tsukushi Province|en|Tsukushi Province|WD=Q1206461|lt=Chikuzen Province|1=Tsukushi Province}} and encamped in {{ill|Shimogun|ja|志摩郡 (福岡県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimogun|1=Shima district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11072233}}. However, he fell ill in June and postponed the expedition. He passed away on March 25, 603, without achieving his mission. His temporary burial was conducted in {{ill|Saba District, Yamaguchi|en|Saba District, Yamaguchi|WD=Q7395781|lt=Saba|1=Saba District, Yamaguchi}}, present-day {{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|WD=Q502209|lt=Hōfu, Yamaguchi|1=Hōfu}}, and overseen by {{ill|Hani no Inote|ja|土師猪手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hani no Inote|1=Q11423457|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11423457}}. Prince Kume was later interred at {{ill|Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja|埴生山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanyū no Yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a {{ill|square tumulus|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square tumulus|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 50 meters on each side, located in present-day {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka|1=Habikino}}. The site is currently managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}}. == Genealogy == The genealogy of Prince Kume and his offspring is partially documented in the {{ill|Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja|聖徳太子平氏伝雑勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku Taishi Heishi-den Zakkambun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the {{ill|Jōgūki|ja|上宮記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgūki|1=Jōgūki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10867356}}. * Father: {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|WD=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}} * Mother: {{ill|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|en|Princess Hashihito no Anahobe|WD=Q11597250|lt=Anahobe no Hashihito|1=Princess Hashihito no Anahobe}}, a daughter of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}} * Siblings: {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|WD=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku|1=Prince Shōtoku}}, {{ill|Prince Shigekuri|ja|殖栗皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Shigekuri|1=Prince Ekuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547041}}, and {{ill|Prince Matsuda|ja|茨田皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Matsuda|1=Prince Manda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617932}} * Wives and children: ''' Wife: {{ill|Yubari no Ō|ja|由波利王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yubari no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (also known as Sakuraibari Ōjo) '''* Son: {{ill|Otoko no Ō|ja|男王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otoko no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Daughter: {{ill|Hoshikawa no Hime|ja|星河女王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshikawa no Hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Saho no Ō|ja|佐富王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saho no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Wife: {{ill|Hiroko no Iratsume|ja|比里古郎女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroko no Iratsume|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} '''* Son: {{ill|Takahashi no Ō|ja|高椅王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ''' Unknown consort: '''* Son: {{ill|Hita no Ō|ja|日田王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hita no Ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ancestor of the {{ill|Tomi clan|ja|登美氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomi clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == have been founded by Prince Kume. * {{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|WD=Q320934|lt=Kurume|1=Kurume}} – the city's name is speculated to derive from Prince Kume. {{translated
